landing.hero-title: Find where to eat, here and now
landing.hero-subtitle: Restaurants, gargottes and street vendors of Antananarivo, by your location, budget and craving.
landing.api-unreachable: The API is unreachable — start it with "pnpm turbo dev --filter=api".

header.logout-success: You are signed out. See you soon!

brand-panel.headline: Your next meal awaits
taglines: A mofo gasy for the road?

phone.label: Phone number
phone.description: Your Malagasy number, it stays private.

display-name.label: Display name
display-name.description: The name other food lovers will see.

account-type.label: Account type
account-type.consumer-hint: I'm looking for places to eat
account-type.business-hint: I run a restaurant or a gargotte

login.title: Welcome back!
login.subtitle: Sign in to find your favorite spots again.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Join the community and share your good finds.
register.success: Account created! Let's verify your number.

verify-phone.title: Verify your number
verify-phone.subtitle: A 6-digit code was sent by SMS to {phone}.
verify-phone.subtitle-no-phone: Enter the number to verify and the code received by SMS.
verify-phone.resend-sent: A new code is on its way.

forgot-password.title: Forgot password
forgot-password.subtitle: Enter your number: if an account exists, a reset code will be sent by SMS.
forgot-password.sent: If an account exists with this number, a code is on its way.

reset-password.title: New password
reset-password.subtitle: Enter the code received by SMS and choose a new password.
reset-password.success: Password reset. Sign in with your new password.

errors.phone-invalid: Invalid number. Use the format 034 12 345 67 or +261 34 12 345 67.
errors.phone-not-verified: Your number is not verified yet. A new code was just sent to you.
errors.account-suspended: This account is suspended. Contact support.
errors.phone-taken: An account already exists with this number.
errors.otp-invalid: Wrong or expired code. Try again or request a new one.
errors.too-many-requests: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes before retrying.
errors.session-expired: Your session has expired. Sign in again.
errors.network: Cannot reach the server. Check your connection.
